title: WysternCraft
body:
The WysternCraft modpack is specifically made to go alongside the server with the same name. It adds custom origins through a datapack, and has its own mod for features to go alongside some of the origins. Alongside the origins, the datapack adds empty custom dimensions (to have their regions folder replaced) as well as some functions to prevent certain events in the game. The mod also changes how armor and damage is calculated, altering it from a linear to a logarithmic function.

  Once again, this is a modpack for a specific server, not a general modpack anyone can have fun with. If you do find this, and wish to give the server a shot, you can join our Discord Server to become one with the community and find the Server Address.

  As it is an English-Speaking server, there will be no translations for other languages.
